metadata.name: Luke
metadata.description: Kompaktes Interlinear-Artefakt fuer Matthaeus, Markus, Lukas und Johannes. Pro Vers werden die OpenGNT-Worttokens mit Lemma, Morphologie, Strong, Transliteration und knappen Glossen bereitgestellt.

1:9.g: it fell to him by lot
1:9.lt: it fell to him by lot

1:19.st: to bring you this good news

2:1.st: that a census should be taken

2:7.lt: she wrapped Him in swaddling cloths
2:7.st: She wrapped Him in swaddling cloths

3:18.g: he was preaching the good news to
3:18.lt: he was preaching the good news to

4:5.st: [the devil] led Him up to a high place

4:29.st: to throw Him over the cliff

7:7.st: I did not consider myself worthy

8:14.st: as they go on their way,

10:11.st: we wipe off as a testimony

10:31.g: he passed by on the opposite side.
10:31.lt: he passed by on the opposite side.
10:31.st: he passed by on the other side.

10:32.g: passed by on the opposite side.
10:32.lt: passed by on the opposite side.
10:32.st: he passed by on the other side.

10:42.lt: will not be taken away from
10:42.st: will not be taken away from

12:21.st: This is how [it will be for]

12:37.st: he will dress himself to serve
will have them recline at the table,

12:44.st: he will put him in charge

12:46.lt: he will cut him in two
12:46.st: He will cut him to pieces

16:19.st: who lived each day in joyous

16:31.st: they will not be persuaded even

17:27.g: they were being given in marriage,
17:27.lt: they were being given in marriage,

18:5.st: she will stop wearing me out

18:20.lt: you shall not bear false witness,

19:44.lt: they will level you to the ground
19:44.st: They will level you to the ground —

20:18.lt: it will grind him into powder

21:38.g: would come early in the morning
21:38.lt: would come to Him early in the morning

22:2.lt: they might put Him to death
